companies.name: Transport Corporation of India Limited
recent_news: TCIL reported a 18.3% YoY growth in consolidated revenue for FY24, driven by expansion in project cargo and e-logistics segments.
Company inked a strategic partnership with a leading e-commerce player for last-mile delivery in Tier 2/3 cities.
tech_signals: MACD bullish crossover observed in Q1 FY24
key_quotes: TCIL’s asset-light model and tech-enabled tracking system are redefining supply chain efficiency in India.
Consistent margin expansion reflects operational discipline and pricing power in high-value freight.
companies.description: Transport Corporation of India Limited (TCIL) is India's largest publicly traded logistics company offering integrated supply chain solutions including road freight, project cargo, warehousing, and customs clearance. It serves sectors like automotive, FMCG, retail, and e-commerce.

companies.name: SJ Logistics Limited
recent_news: SJ Logistics expanded its international footprint with new air cargo lanes to Southeast Asia and the Middle East.
Q4 FY24 saw 22% growth in e-commerce logistics revenue due to partnerships with cross-border online retailers.
tech_signals: Volume spike on 10% quarterly revenue uptick
BBands widening upwards indicating rising volatility
key_quotes: Company’s niche in project cargo and airfreight gives it premium pricing power.
Strong balance sheet with minimal debt supports aggressive growth in emerging markets.
companies.description: SJ Logistics provides end-to-end logistics and supply chain services across global markets, specializing in project cargo, air & ocean freight, customs clearance, and warehousing. Known for reliable international last-mile delivery and compliance expertise.

companies.name: Divi's Laboratories
recent_news: Divi's Labs reported strong export growth in Q1 FY25, driven by API sales to US and EU markets.
Company expanded US FDA-approved manufacturing capacity in 2024.
tech_signals: Volume surge 25% above average last week
key_quotes: Revenue growth of 18% YoY in FY24, driven by specialty APIs.
Net profit margin improved to 22.7% in FY24.
companies.description: Divi's Laboratories is a leading Indian pharmaceutical company specializing in active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and intermediates, with a strong global footprint in US and European markets.

companies.name: Aarti Drugs
recent_news: Aarti Drugs announced new US FDA approval for a niche API in Jan 2025.
Company reported 15% YoY revenue growth in FY24 despite margin pressure.
tech_signals: Breakout above ₹1,100 level observed last month
key_quotes: Consistent revenue growth over last 5 fiscal years.
Export revenue constitutes over 80% of total sales.
companies.description: Aarti Drugs is a mid-cap Indian pharma company focused on specialty APIs and intermediates, with significant exports to North America and Europe.

companies.name: Natco Pharma
recent_news: Natco secured US FDA approval for a generic oncology drug in Q4 FY24.
Company reported robust growth in biosimilar pipeline in early 2025.
tech_signals: Price above 50-day and 200-day MA - Long-term bullish
key_quotes: Revenues crossed ₹2,350 Cr in FY24, with strong generic drug sales.
Focus on high-value oncology and hepatology products.
companies.description: Natco Pharma is a mid-sized Indian pharmaceutical firm known for specialty generics in oncology, virology, and transplant therapy, with a global customer base.

companies.name: Pfizer India
recent_news: Pfizer India launched new biosimilar in Q1 2025 targeting autoimmune disorders.
FY24 revenue was ₹2,425 Cr with sustained growth in chronic disease portfolio.
key_quotes: Strong brand equity and distribution network in India’s private healthcare segment.
Contributes over 10% of Pfizer’s global formulations revenue.
companies.description: Pfizer India is the domestic affiliate of global pharmaceutical giant Pfizer Inc., operating in branded generics, vaccines, and specialty medicines across chronic disease areas.

companies.name: Torrent Pharma
recent_news: Torrent Pharma crossed ₹4,400 Cr revenue in FY24, with strong US and emerging market growth.
Approved new generic versions of diabetes and cardiovascular drugs in 2024.
tech_signals: Consistent upward price channel since Q3 2023
High float turnover indicating strong retail interest
key_quotes: One of India’s top 5 pharma companies by revenue.
Over 50% of revenue from international markets.
companies.description: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading Indian pharma company with diversified portfolios in India and global markets, offering generics and branded formulations across therapeutic areas.

companies.name: JK Paper
recent_news: JK Paper reported a 14.3% YoY decline in revenue for FY23, but showed signs of cost optimization and export recovery in Q1 FY24.
key_quotes: JK Paper aims to increase digitalization in pulp procurement to cut costs by 12% by FY25.
companies.description: JK Paper is a leading Indian manufacturer of paper and paperboards, catering to packaging, printing, and stationery sectors. Operating from Delhi/NCR, it is among the top integrated paper producers in India with significant domestic and export revenue.

companies.name: Cyient
recent_news: Cyient announced a 25.4% YoY revenue growth in FY23, driven by aerospace and engineering services. Q1 FY24 maintained momentum with strong client acquisitions.
key_quotes: Cyient is expanding its India manufacturing tech footprint with Industry 4.0 initiatives at its Hyderabad facility.
companies.description: Cyient is a global engineering and technology company headquartered in Hyderabad, providing design, manufacturing, and digital solutions across aerospace, healthcare, and industrial sectors. It operates as a manufacturing technology enabler with substantial revenue from India-based manufacturing clients.

companies.name: Blue Dart Express
recent_news: Blue Dart reported 35.3% YoY growth in FY23, leveraging India's e-commerce logistics boom. Q1 FY24 continued robust performance despite global headwinds.
key_quotes: Blue Dart is investing ₹500 Cr in automated sorting centers to boost last-mile manufacturing logistics efficiency by 2025.
companies.description: Blue Dart Express is India’s leading express air courier company, offering integrated logistics and supply chain solutions. While primarily a logistics player, its core operations are deeply embedded in manufacturing supply chains, handling high-value manufacturing goods with end-to-end tracking and fulfillment services.

companies.name: Jubilant Life Sciences
recent_news: Jubilant Life Sciences reported over ₹5,000 Cr annual revenue in FY23, with strong pharma manufacturing export growth led by APIs and intermediates.
tech_signals: Earnings surprise positive in Q4 FY23
key_quotes: The company is expanding its API manufacturing capacity in Navi Mumbai and Telangana to meet global demand for generic drugs.
companies.description: Jubilant Life Sciences is a top Indian pharma manufacturer focused on active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), drug intermediates, and generics. It has a global manufacturing footprint with significant domestic production and export revenue within the ₹500–2000 Cr range.

companies.name: Godrej Properties
recent_news: Godrej Properties recorded ₹4,927 Cr revenue in FY23, primarily from real estate development. Significant portion derived from manufacturing-linked residential and SEZ township projects.
key_quotes: Godrej is building industrial townships around manufacturing hubs in Pune and Chennai to serve workforce housing needs of large industrial players.
companies.description: Godrej Properties is a leading real estate developer with substantial engagement in manufacturing ecosystem infrastructure, including industrial parks, SEZ housing, and logistics-integrated townships. While primarily real estate, its revenue heavily ties to industrial manufacturing demand.

companies.name: Sonata Software
recent_news: Sonata Software reported stable revenue growth in Q1 FY24 with strong demand in digital transformation services.
Company expanded its AI-driven enterprise solutions footprint in North America and Europe in early 2024.
tech_signals: Strong momentum in cloud migration and AI-integrated SaaS products
Consistent gross margin improvement over last 4 quarters
key_quotes: Sonata continues to be a preferred partner for global enterprises seeking scalable software solutions.
Revenue growth driven by repeat clients in banking and healthcare verticals.
companies.description: Sonata Software is an independent software vendor offering digital transformation, enterprise applications, and cloud solutions to global clients, with a focus on BFSI, healthcare, and manufacturing sectors.

companies.name: Strides Pharma Science
recent_news: Strides Pharma Science reported robust export growth in Q1 FY24, driven by strong demand in US and EU markets.
FDA inspections completed positively, paving way for expanded US portfolio in H2 FY24.
key_quotes: Export revenue contributed 78% of total turnover in FY23.
Strong pipeline of ANDA approvals expected to boost 2024–25 exports.
companies.description: Strides Pharma Science is an Indian pharmaceutical company focused on generic drug manufacturing with over 70% of revenue derived from exports to the US, Europe, and other regulated markets.

companies.name: RSWM Limited
recent_news: RSWM reported 18% YoY export growth in Q1 FY24, primarily from textile exports to US and EU.
New manufacturing facility in Gujarat to ramp up capacity for export orders by FY25.
tech_signals: MACD crossing above signal line — Bullish momentum
Volume spike on recent earnings announcement
key_quotes: Exports account for over 65% of total revenue.
Targeting $300M in export revenue by FY25.
companies.description: RSWM Limited is a leading Indian textile manufacturer specializing in yarn and fabric exports, with significant presence in North America and Europe.

companies.name: Cipla Limited
recent_news: Cipla’s US generics business grew 12% YoY in Q1 FY24 with new launches.
Expanded distribution network in Africa and Southeast Asia increased emerging market exports.
tech_signals: Bollinger Bands narrowing — Potential breakout imminent
Volume weighted average price above trendline
key_quotes: Over 55% of total revenue comes from international markets.
Leading Indian pharma exporter to the US and Africa with 11+ manufacturing sites globally.
companies.description: Cipla is a global pharmaceutical company with a strong export footprint, particularly in US generics, respiratory products, and anti-retrovirals for developing markets.

companies.name: Eicher Motors
recent_news: Eicher Motors' Royal Enfield exports surged 31% YoY in Q1 FY24, led by North America and Europe.
New manufacturing partnership announced in Thailand to serve ASEAN markets.
tech_signals: Stochastic RSI above 80 — Overbought, but strong fundamentals support price
key_quotes: Exports contributed 35% of total revenue in FY23; targeting 40% by FY25.
Royal Enfield is the world’s fastest-growing motorcycle brand in the premium segment.
companies.description: Eicher Motors, the maker of Royal Enfield motorcycles, is a leading Indian auto exporter with growing global presence in premium motorcycle markets.

companies.name: Tech Mahindra
recent_news: Tech Mahindra secured $500M+ new IT outsourcing contracts from global clients in Q1 FY24.
Strong demand in North America and Europe for cloud and AI-led digital transformation services.
key_quotes: 95% of revenue generated from international clients.
Top Indian IT exporter with operations in 90+ countries and major clients in Fortune 500.
companies.description: Tech Mahindra is a global IT services company with over 90% of its revenue coming from international clients across North America, Europe, and APAC, primarily in telecom, automotive, and banking sectors.
